description: An agent must take a list of sources and format them into a consistent citation style (e.g., APA).

nodes.task_description: Receive a list of sources in various informal formats.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent ingests the list of sources.

nodes.task_description: For each source, identify the author, year, title, and publication information.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly extracts the metadata from each source string.

nodes.task_description: Format each source into the APA citation style.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces a correctly formatted bibliography in APA style.
